rewrites.newDefinition: Resting unconsciously through the night, restoring body and tired mind.
Lit glass surface displaying images on phones, computers, and televisions.
Producing a sharp ringing sound from phones, doorbells, or alarm clocks.
Cheap fizzy soft drink especially popular among German children at events.
Spoken pledge or, metaphorically, an early hint of something good arriving.
Saturday and Sunday taken together as relaxing time off work.
Polite expression used to apologize or get someone's attention courteously.
Sliding unintentionally; words can slip out before the brain catches them.
Small mounted doorbell often standing in for harder unspoken topics.
